summary: Audience recording of the 1980‑era first set captures a night where Jerry was on fire, though technical details are scarce.
review: The reviewer rates this as one of the best shows they ever attended, highlighting Jerry Garcia’s blazing playing and the band riding his energy. The recording is an audience tape of the first set, with no specific comments about sound quality, but the overall enthusiasm suggests it is at least listenable. No particular songs are singled out beyond general praise.

ai_rating.rationale: A single glowing review emphasizes an outstanding performance, but provides little information on recording quality; rating reflects strong show with assumed decent audience tape.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity or mix; presumed acceptable for an audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall praised as a peak performance of the southern mini‑tour, with no specific set‑by‑set analysis provided.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as 'on fire all night' and leading an electrifying show.
